localized title: We Need to Talk About Kevin
plot outline: Eva's a mother trying to piece together her life following an incident caused by her odd child, Kevin. Once a successful writer, she's forced to take whatever comes her way, in spite of the increasingly bizarre and dangerous things Kevin says, or does.
title: We Need to Talk About Kevin
original title: We Need to Talk About Kevin
akas: Трябва да поговорим за Кевин (Bulgaria, Bulgarian title)
Ngo yanji si okmo (Hong Kong, Cantonese title)
